task_completion.description: An image editor is open with a landscape photo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image editing application GUI is visible, displaying a landscape photograph on the canvas.

task_completion.description: The rectangular selection tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rectangular selection tool (often a dashed box icon) is highlighted or selected in the application's toolbar.

task_completion.description: A rectangular selection is made in the center of the image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed outline ('marching ants') indicating a rectangular selection is visible in the middle 60% of the image canvas.

task_completion.description: The primary color is set to blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active foreground color in the color picker or palette is set to a strong blue.

task_completion.description: The rectangular selection is filled with solid blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid blue rectangle is visible in the center of the image, matching the previously selected area. The rectangle should not touch the edges of the image.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a GUI image editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical image editing application being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.
Screenshots show the progression from the original image to the selection, and finally the filled rectangle, rather than just opening a pre-edited image.

integrity.description: The fill was applied to the image itself.
integrity.visual_evidence: The blue rectangle is drawn on the image canvas within the editor, not as a separate floating window or an overlay outside the image canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses 800x533 landscape photos. The blue color must be strong (R < 80, G < 80, B > 180). The filled rectangle must have an area between 1,000 and 150,000 pixels (roughly between 31x31 and 387x387 pixels). The rectangle must be positioned entirely within the middle 60% of the image's width and height.
